query:
CREATE TABLE `communication_logs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`recipient_type` enum('member','lead') NOT NULL,
	`recipient_id` int,
	`recipient_email` varchar(255),
	`recipient_phone` varchar(20),
	`recipient_name` varchar(200),
	`channel` enum('sms','email','push') NOT NULL,
	`direction` enum('outbound','inbound') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'outbound',
	`subject` varchar(500),
	`body` text NOT NULL,
	`comm_status` enum('queued','sent','delivered','failed','bounced','opened','clicked') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
	`provider` enum('twilio_sms','twilio_email','encharge','boomerang_push') NOT NULL,
	`provider_message_id` varchar(255),
	`provider_status` varchar(100),
	`error_message` text,
	`campaign_name` varchar(255),
	`cost_cents` int,
	`sent_at` bigint,
	`delivered_at` bigint,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `communication_logs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
